description: A broadcast journalist needs to write a 90-second script for the evening news about a city council meeting.

nodes.task_description: Review the video footage and notes from the meeting to find the most important or dramatic moment.

expected_outcome.value: The key soundbite and event are identified.

nodes.task_description: Write a script in a standard two-column format (video cues on the left, audio/narration on the right).

expected_outcome.value: A properly formatted broadcast script is created.

nodes.task_description: Time the script by reading it aloud to ensure it fits within the 90-second slot.

expected_outcome.value: The script is confirmed to be the correct length.
